none.justification: Correctly identifies the kernel definition at include/linux/container_of.h:18-23, quotes the full macro, explains ptr/type/member accurately, notes container_of_const is separate, and lists the 4 subtree-local non-kernel copies with a correct no-conflict explanation. codegraph.justification: Correctly gives include/linux/container_of.h:18-23, quotes the macro, explains its operation and parameters, and lists the 4 other definitions present in the execution subtree. Its no-conflict rationale is consistent with the GT.
